evidence_quotes.quote: the removal of many legacies on Steam and Itch.io

paragraphs.text: In relation to the censorship of the Collective SHOUT group towards the Visa, Mastercard and PayPal banks, which led to the addition of tyrannic rules and the removal of many legacies on Steam and Itch.io, I find these measures illegal and close to dystopic. They enrich the libertee and make it possible for a small minority to dominate a large majority without reason or democracy. Even though CERTAIN of these emergencies should not be free access, the majority was not only legalised but did not call for a sexual/prohibited mention to the explicit minor and did not fear the steam/Itch laws or that of the EU, Australia (or viennet deletions) and the US (or Itch and Steam are basee). Everywhere, the internet is struggling against this unprovoked attack and symbolically responding on behalf of the libertee.
